channel.title: Life Sciences on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Life Sciences on yexca'Blog

item.title: Into the NDE: Debugging the Afterlife
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-pro Consciousness: Containerized. Intuition: Overclocked. Observation: Write-Access to Reality. NDE (Near-Death Experience) is basically what happens when your system uptime hits 99.9% and then suddenly crashes, only to reboot with unexpected admin privileges. Organizations like IANDS and researchers like Dr. P.M.H. Atwater have logged thousands of tickets (case studies) on this. This article is based on that research plus my own …
